title: Enhanced Pokemon Boss Bars
description: Stylized pixel-art boss bars inspired by Pokémon, tailored for Cobblemon and Pixelmon trainers.
body: ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_dfcb3d04-4134-42c1-8545-2c5e4bd0c49f.png) # 🎮 **Enhanced Cobblemon Boss Bars** _A Pokémon-inspired visual upgrade for Minecraft's boss battles._ *** ## 🧠 **What is this?** **Enhanced Cobblemon Boss Bars** is a pixel-art resource pack that replaces the default boss bars in Minecraft with custom designs themed around legendary Pokémon. Each bar is hand-crafted to match the personality and color palette of iconic Pokémon — whether you're facing a Darkrai-shaped Wither or a Rayquaza-like Ender Dragon, your epic fights now feel even more legendary. > 🧭 This pack is built with **Cobblemon** in mind, but works with any modpack or vanilla setup. *** ## ✨ **Features** * ✅ **Ender Dragon** boss bar → Styled after **Rayquaza** * ✅ **Wither** boss bar → Styled after **Darkrai** * ✅ **Raid bar** → Styled after **Zacian** (Hero of Many Battles) * ✅ Pokémon-themed pixel-art health bars with unique colors and motifs * 🎨 Clean retro style to match Cobblemon’s aesthetic * 💡 Fully compatible with **Minecraft 1.20 – 1.20.1 & 1.21 – 1.21.1** *** ## 📦 **Compatibility** This pack works: * In both **vanilla** and **modded** Minecraft * With or without **OptiFine**, **Iris**, or any shaders * As a lightweight, **client-side only** pack — no mods needed *** ## 🛠 **Installation** 1. Download the `.zip` and place it into your `resourcepacks/` folder. 2. In Minecraft, go to **Options > Resource Packs** and enable the pack. 3. Make sure it appears **on top** of other resource packs. 4. Join a world or server, summon a boss, and enjoy the new look! *** ## 💬 **Notes** * This is a **visual-only** pack — it does not change boss mechanics or spawns. * Fully compatible with any custom UI packs or shaders. *** ## 🤝 **Partnered with BisectHosting** [Looking to play your modpack with friends on a reliable server?](https://bisecthosting.com/OurStory) **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/OurStory)** is the perfect choice for hosting your **Cobblemon** adventure — with 20+ global server locations and over 10 years of experience, they guarantee smooth, lag-free gameplay. ✨ **Features**: * Automated modpack setup & updates * 24/7 support * Instant setup * Affordable plans 🎁 **Use code `OurStory`** for **25% off** your first month as a new customer! > 🧭 Start your journey with ease — host your server with confidence. *** ## 🙌 **Credits** Inspired by the amazing [Enhanced Boss Bars](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/enhanced-boss-bars) by **Nakuring**. Designed and created by **LevelsFR**, for the **Cobblemon Realms** universe. ***
